_meta.keyKnowledge: We are learning to join in with chants, rhymes and songs that we know.

_source.w: We are learning to join in with chants, rhymes and songs that we know.
y: Joining in with rhymes and songs helps us feel the rhythm and patterns of language.
Participating in shared songs builds our confidence and connects us with others.
Chants and rhymes help us remember words and patterns more easily.
eg: We use a device, our voice, signs or actions to join in with a song.
We clap along to the beat of a familiar chant.
We say the last word of each line in a rhyme we know well.
We do the actions for a favourite song along with our classmates.
We press a button to play the next part of a familiar rhyme.
We hum or move our body to the rhythm of a song during music time.
